reach_why: Extends known ideas on continual learning and systems budgets, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links memory budgeting, mixed-scale interference, and test-time adaptation residues into one governance frame.
falsifiable_why: Claims about persistence, future behavior change, and multidimensional costs can be operationalized and empirically tested.
explanation: Memory and learning boundaries are multidimensional, unstable, and residue-dependent, so deployment may covertly become continual learning.
